layout.layout_rhythm: monochrome: high density, high formality. Ivory ledger paper with all-black type; Lora serif headlines, Jost body, no color at all.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"pad_x": "8vw", "pad_y": "6vh", "gap_lg": "5vh", "gap_md": "3vh", "gap_sm": "1.5vh"}

template_json_typography.style: literary serif headlines + clean geometric sans body + technical mono; reads like a hand-typeset ledger

design_tokens_typography.style: literary serif headlines + clean geometric sans body + technical mono; reads like a hand-typeset ledger

typography.typography_role: literary serif headlines + clean geometric sans body + technical mono; reads like a hand-typeset ledger

cjk_policy.known_degradation: The 8vw horizontal padding (the most generous in the library) was tuned for Latin's narrower glyph widths. Chinese characters are roughly square and consume more horizontal space at the same point size. Long Chinese headlines that would fit on one line in English may wrap to two. Reduce display headline sizes by ~15% (Jost 8.5vw → Noto Sans SC 7.2vw) when th

template_json_palette.description: ivory and pale-cream paper with deep ink-black type only; no color at all; the system runs on typography, line, and white space

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Lora 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 Jost 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

text_decoration_policy.underline.color.raw_value: nmoving. Italic is used exclusively in Lora (pull-quote body) and not in Jost. Underline is not used anywhere. Bold is not used to emphasize body text — emphasis inside a paragraph is achieved either by Lora italic switch (rare) or by isolation through whitespace. ## Layout ### Canvas System The

italic.raw_value: ltra-light geometric sans (Jost at weight 200–300) carries every headline; Lora italic serif handles quote text and insight-card titles; JetBrains Mono provides the structural chrome. There are no chromatic accents — every color in the palette is a graphite or cream tone, and "accent" simply means "
